name: ShiftCore

pricing_tiers.notes: Shift scheduling, leave management, basic self-service
Adds payroll export, compliance reporting, API access

known_limitations: GDPR right-to-erasure is manual process only — no automation, support ticket required
No continuous performance feedback or review cycles — annual cycle only
No PayAxis native integration — payroll export via CSV only
No eNPS or pulse survey tooling
Audit log not exportable in Standard or Plus tier
Designed for shift-based workforces — poor fit for knowledge worker / consulting use cases
notes: At 150 seats, Standard tier = £330/mo vs PeoplePulse £385/mo = £55/mo saving (£660/yr). Migration at 10hrs × £48 = £480, amortised £160/yr. Net = £500/yr — below £1,200 threshold. Critically: does not resolve any of PeoplePulse's known issues. GDPR erasure remains manual, PayAxis integration absent, no performance or onboarding tooling. Designed for shift-based workforces — consultancy use case is a poor fit. STAY verdict — cheap but provides no operational benefit, and audit log not exportable (hard block for HR category).
